category_sources: Official Heroku Dev Center article documents the Heroku CLI for managing Heroku apps from the command line.
source_facts.description says it is the CLI for Heroku.
display_name_sources: Official Dev Center page title is "The Heroku CLI".
Official GitHub repository title is "Heroku CLI".
docs_sources: Official Heroku Dev Center provides the dedicated Heroku CLI article.
repo_sources: Official Heroku GitHub organization is verified for heroku.com and lists heroku/cli as "Heroku CLI".
The heroku/cli README links back to the official Dev Center CLI article.
tags_sources: Official repository command topics cover Heroku apps, addons, buildpacks, releases, logs, pipelines, and deployment workflows.
